growth_records.cite: Awala et al. Verrucomicrobial methanotrophs grow on diverse C3 compounds and use a homolog of particulate methane monooxygenase to oxidize acetone. The ISME Journal (2021). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01037-2. [PMC8630023]
growth_records.snippet: Growth rates of strain IT6 on methane, methanol, and C3 substrates were comparable (0.033−0.058 h−1) (Fig. 3). ... Methane 4.03 ± 0.04 (methane grown cells) mmol h−1 g-DCW−1 (Table 1).
growth_records.notes: Growth: reported specific growth-rate range 0.033-0.058 h-1 across methane/methanol/C3 substrates (text + Fig. 3); exact per-substrate mu not numerically stated, only in Fig. 3 bar chart. Doubling time derived td=ln2/mu: ln2/0.058=11.95 h to ln2/0.033=21.0 h. Uptake rates are resting-cell specific oxidation activities of METHANE-grown cells (Table 1), GC-based, OD600=1, 1% v/v gas substrate. O2 derived from stated methane:O2 consumption stoichiometry 1:1.55 → 4.03×1.55=6.25 mmol/gDCW/h. Ethane/propane are co-metabolic (not growth substrates). Batch, aerobic, 50 °C, pH 4.5.

up.method: resting-cell specific activity, GC (Table 1, acetone-grown cells; 1 mM liquid substrate, OD600=1)
resting-cell specific activity, GC (Table 1, acetone-grown cells)
resting-cell specific activity, GC (Table 1, acetone-grown cells)

growth_records.cite: Awala et al. Verrucomicrobial methanotrophs grow on diverse C3 compounds and use a homolog of particulate methane monooxygenase to oxidize acetone. The ISME Journal (2021). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01037-2. [PMC8630023]
growth_records.snippet: Acetone 0.76 ± 0.01, Butanone 0.19 ± 0.01, Ethane 0.43 ± 0.03 (acetone grown cells; mmol h−1 g-DCW−1, Table 1). ... acetone to oxygen consumption was estimated at 4:1.
growth_records.notes: Growth rate: reported range 0.033-0.058 h-1 (exact acetone value only in Fig. 3). td=ln2/mu → 11.95-21.0 h. Uptake rates = resting-cell specific oxidation activities of ACETONE-grown cells (Table 1). O2 derived from stated acetone:O2 consumption stoichiometry 4:1 → 0.76/4=0.19 mmol/gDCW/h (as stated in paper; note this reflects the AcMO first-oxidation step not full mineralization). Butanone/ethane co-oxidized, not growth substrates. Acetone-grown resting cells did NOT oxidize methane or propane (nd in Table 1). Batch, aerobic, 50 °C, pH 4.5.

up.method: growth substrate; specific uptake rate not reported

growth_records.cite: Awala et al. Verrucomicrobial methanotrophs grow on diverse C3 compounds and use a homolog of particulate methane monooxygenase to oxidize acetone. The ISME Journal (2021). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01037-2. [PMC8630023]
growth_records.snippet: Growth rates of strain IT6 on methane, methanol, and C3 substrates were comparable (0.033−0.058 h−1) (Fig. 3). ... Substrates were: 10% methane (v/v), 30 mM methanol, and 10 mM each of 2-propanol, acetone, or acetol.
growth_records.notes: Methanol (30 mM) growth condition. Reported mu range 0.033-0.058 h-1 (exact methanol value only in Fig. 3 bar chart). td=ln2/mu → 11.95-21.0 h. No specific methanol uptake rate or product secretion reported. Batch, aerobic, 50 °C, pH 4.5.

up.method: growth substrate; specific uptake rate not reported

growth_records.cite: Awala et al. Verrucomicrobial methanotrophs grow on diverse C3 compounds and use a homolog of particulate methane monooxygenase to oxidize acetone. The ISME Journal (2021). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01037-2. [PMC8630023]
growth_records.snippet: Growth rates of strain IT6 on methane, methanol, and C3 substrates were comparable (0.033−0.058 h−1) (Fig. 3). ... 10 mM each of 2-propanol, acetone, or acetol.
growth_records.notes: 2-propanol (10 mM) growth condition. Reported mu range 0.033-0.058 h-1 (exact 2-propanol value only in Fig. 3 bar chart). td=ln2/mu → 11.95-21.0 h. Oxidized to acetone→acetol→pyruvate. No specific uptake/secretion rate reported. Batch, aerobic, 50 °C, pH 4.5.

up.method: growth substrate; specific uptake rate not reported

growth_records.cite: Awala et al. Verrucomicrobial methanotrophs grow on diverse C3 compounds and use a homolog of particulate methane monooxygenase to oxidize acetone. The ISME Journal (2021). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01037-2. [PMC8630023]
growth_records.snippet: Growth rates of strain IT6 on methane, methanol, and C3 substrates were comparable (0.033−0.058 h−1) (Fig. 3). ... 10 mM each of 2-propanol, acetone, or acetol.
growth_records.notes: Acetol / hydroxyacetone (10 mM) growth condition. Reported mu range 0.033-0.058 h-1 (exact acetol value only in Fig. 3 bar chart). td=ln2/mu → 11.95-21.0 h. Acetol is oxidized to pyruvate. No specific uptake/secretion rate reported. Batch, aerobic, 50 °C, pH 4.5.
